# fly_certificates (Data Source)

Lists TLS certificates for a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_certificates" "all" {
  app = "my-app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The application name.

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) The list of certificates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `certificate_authority` (String) Certificate authority.
- `check_status` (String) Validation status.
- `created_at` (String) Created timestamp.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname.
- `id` (String) Certificate ID.
- `source` (String) Certificate source.
